items.title: May 31, 1998: Chicago's Scottie Pippen drives and scores with two minutes to go in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Finals against Indiana.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 31, 1998: Chicago's Scottie Pippen drives and scores with two minutes to go in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Finals against Indiana.

Pippen had 17 PTS/12 REB/2 STL and Michael Jordan had 28 PTS/9 REB/8 AST in the Bulls' 88-83 win. The Pacers' Reggie Miller scored 22 PTS.

items.title: INSANE: Chet Holmgren made history by becoming the first player in NBA playoff history to attempt two or fewer shots while playing over 30 minutes in a Game 7.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
INSANE: Chet Holmgren made history by becoming the first player in NBA playoff history to attempt two or fewer shots while playing over 30 minutes in a Game 7.

Holmgren didn’t attempt a single shot during the final 31 minutes of the game. 😬

(via Polymarket Hoops)
#NBA

items.title: NEW:
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW:

The Sixers did not spend much money last summer, largely because they were waiting out Quentin Grimes' restricted free agency.

This summer, they won't have the same restraint.

Why will timing tell us how they feel about their own free agents?

items.title: It's always funny to see how much attention the Valkyries want to throw at A'ja Wilson. Empty side pick and roll and you get Wilson rolling and you think you're good. Two defenders are there on the catch, neither of which started the play guarding A'ja.

items.title: Good set from the Aces to start this one, poking at Valkyries defense. Zipper for Jackie Young into pass and cut with Smith. Chelsea Gray set a pindown for Smith and slipped. No show on Young getting the ball because you think help is there. It was not, easy 2 for Young.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt: Good set from the Aces to start this one, poking at Valkyries defense. Zipper for Jackie Young into pass and cut with Smith. Chelsea Gray set a pindown for Smith and slipped. No show on Young getting the ball because you think help is there. It was not, easy 2 for Young.
